reason: This is a bootstrap controller review after planning run run-011, not a post-step review of a completed step in the new chain. Run-011 selected the active chain as the canonical response to step-015's geometry-branch failure: compare the remaining exact-NS candidate families under one fixed Tao-differential contract, one frozen theorem-facing floor, and one evidence gate before spending more budget on any single mechanism. No executed result under this new chain has weakened it yet, so mission control should proceed into its first logical step and freeze that comparison frame concretely.
next_logical_chain_step: Calibrate Tao differential contract and freeze comparison frame
